sourcesContent:
function About() { return (

Who Are We?

Community Help Hub is a simple web platform created to connect people who need support with others who are willing to help. The idea is to make community support easier to find, organize, and share.

Our platform focuses on useful everyday services such as education support, home services, technical help, volunteering, and community requests. Users can explore available help categories, request assistance, or offer their own skills to support others.

We believe that strong communities are built when people communicate, cooperate, and use their skills to make life easier for one another. Even a small service or a simple act of kindness can make a real difference.

); } export default About;
